packages.description: A Nushell plugin to manipulate SemVer versions: parse, compare, sort, bump, and match against version requirements. Windows-only for now: upstream only publishes .tar.xz archives for Linux/macOS, and Numan's installer does not support that format yet.

A Nushell test framework: discovers and runs @test-annotated commands with rich reporting and output capture. Commands are imported unprefixed (e.g. `run-tests`, not upstream's documented `nutest run-tests`): Numan's activation currently imports the mod.nu file directly rather than the containing directory, so Nu does not apply its directory-name-to-module-name convention here. The artifact URL points at a byte-identical mirror of upstream's v1.1.0 tag archive hosted on this registry, not upstream's own auto-generated archive endpoint, since GitHub does not guarantee those stay byte-stable over time and upstream has no uploaded release asset to pin against instead.
